chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 29 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.12 & 25 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.114/2024 20.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Awais, advocate holds brief for Mr. Fawad Ali Khichi, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Sahito, advocate for the respondent On the last date, i.e. 13.10.2025, following order was passed:- “Learned counsel is confronted as to how this reference can be entertained in view of paragraph 22 of the judgment of the Supreme Court reported as 2025 SCMR 969 and Divisional Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2022 PTD 1112. At his request, to come up on 20.10.2025.” Despite a fixed date having been given, today merely a brief is held for the counsel for the applicant and adjournment is sought. Accordingly, the instant reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
